speaker: speaker1
text: What can I do for you today ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I would like to use a computer .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you have your library card ?

speaker: speaker1
text: There is a wait for the computers .

speaker: speaker1
text: You need to print your name on this list .

speaker: speaker1
text: Once a computer is available , I will let you know .

speaker: speaker2
text: How am I supposed to log on to the computer ?

speaker: speaker1
text: All you do is type in the number on the back of your card .

speaker: speaker2
text: That ’ s it ? Thank you very much .
